## Task Complete

**Task**: Make holidays behave the same as vacation days in the timesheet system

**Status**: Completed

**What was done**:
- Added holiday fetching from `GET /calendar?year=YYYY` API and built a `holidayDates` Set filtered to the current week
- Updated min-hours validation on the frontend to skip holiday dates
- Passed `holidayDates` prop to `TimesheetGrid`
- Added `holidayDates` prop and `isHoliday` callback to `TimesheetGrid`, integrated into `isNonWorking` logic so cells are disabled on holidays
- Added "Holiday" label in column headers (orange text, distinct from purple "Vacation" label)
- Updated backend `autoFillLeaveEntries` to also query the `calendar` table for holidays (`is_holiday = true`) and auto-insert 8h LEAVE-001 entries with the holiday name or "Public Holiday" as description
- Vacation dates take precedence -- if a date is both a vacation and holiday, it shows as "Vacation" with "Annual Leave" description

**Files changed**:
- `/Users/tachongrak/Projects/ts/frontend/src/app/(authenticated)/time-entry/page.tsx` - Added `CalendarDay` interface, calendar API query, `holidayDates` Set, holiday skip in min-hours check, pass `holidayDates` to grid
- `/Users/tachongrak/Projects/ts/frontend/src/components/timesheet/TimesheetGrid.tsx` - Added `holidayDates` prop, `isHoliday` callback, integrated into `isNonWorking`, added "Holiday" label in header
- `/Users/tachongrak/Projects/ts/backend/src/timesheets/timesheets.service.ts` - Updated `autoFillLeaveEntries` to query calendar table for holidays and auto-fill LEAVE-001 entries with holiday name

**Verification**: Backend type-check passes cleanly. Frontend type-check shows no errors in changed files (pre-existing errors in unrelated files only).</result>
